message: Trays are still cooling from yesterday. Ratio notes are a mess. We're starting over on the cornmeal base.
Want to pull the batch notes from yesterday so we can see which cornmeal ratio actually performed best?
Pull them. The 70/30 cornmeal to flour split was closest - everything else separated.
So we're locking 70/30 and building from there today - does that feel right to everyone?
Locking 70/30 makes sense - that ratio respects the cornmeal's actual flavor instead of drowning it. What's the fat situation looking like with that split?
The fat's the variable that'll either make this sing or fall flat - butter alone won't give you that crisp exterior the cornmeal deserves. We're locked in, we move forward. Good work today.
